ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "v1" INTEGER /* Attribute V1 */,
  "v2" INTEGER /* Attribute V2 */,
  "v3" INTEGER /* Attribute V3 */,
  "v4" INTEGER /* Attribute V4 */,
  "v5" INTEGER /* Attribute V5 */,
  "v6" INTEGER /* Attribute V6 */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "mall_visits" INTEGER /* Number of mall visits per year */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the CRM system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "shopping_preferences" TEXT /* Shopping preferences of the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer in the loyalty program */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_loyalty_status FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_status") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mall_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mall visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the mall visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mall visit in minutes */,
  "store_visited" INTEGER /* Store ID the customer visited */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the visit occurred */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the visit occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mall_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mall_visits_store_visited FOREIGN KEY ("store_visited") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the purchase was made */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of any promotion applied to the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the program */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to join the program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to join the program */,
  "annual_renewal" TEXT /* Annual renewal date of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered by the promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store offering the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to avail the promotion */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer support interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue raised by the customer */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution provided to the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "support_channel" TEXT /* Channel of support */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the issue */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income analysis */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the customer */,
  "spending_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of spending observed */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "spending_categories" TEXT /* Categories of spending */,
  "spending_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of spending */,
  "spending_trends" TEXT /* Spending trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer engagement activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement activity */,
  "response" TEXT /* Customer response to the activity */,
  "engagement_channel" TEXT /* Channel of engagement */,
  "engagement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of engagement */,
  "engagement_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration project */,
  "department_a" TEXT /* Name of department A involved in the collaboration */,
  "department_b" TEXT /* Name of department B involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* Names of team members involved in the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
